title: Cloudflare Inc (NET) Q1 2024 Earnings: Surpasses Revenue Forecasts with Robust Growth
text: Cloudflare reported first-quarter revenue of $378.6 million, a 30% increase year-over-year, surpassing the analyst's estimate of $373.08 million. Non-GAAP EPS was $0.16, exceeding the expected $0.13. Non-GAAP gross margin improved to 79.5% from 77.8% year-over-year, indicating enhanced profitability. Cloudflare achieved $35.6 million in free cash flow, representing 9% of revenue, showing robust improvement from $13.9 million in the previous year. For the second quarter of fiscal 2024, Cloudflare anticipated revenue between $393.5 million and $394.5 million, and the full-year revenue expectation ranges from $1,648.0 to $1,652.0 million.
